    9986288
    9986288
    9986288
}
type = { 
    1.1
    1.9
    1
    1
    1
    2.2
}


//----- Green flag events ---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

WhenGreenFlagClicked()
{
    List.DeleteAll(Av.FPS);
    Variable.Hide(FOV);
    Variable.Hide(GHOST);
    Variable.Hide(RES);
    Variable.Hide(FPS);
    Flame = -35;
    Forever
    {
        Flame += 1;
        FRAME = ((sqrt((Flame / 2.3)) * 100) - 1000);
        List.Add(Av.FPS, (1 / Sensing.Timer()));
        If (List.Length(Av.FPS) > 6)
        {
            List.DeleteItem(Av.FPS, 1);
        }
        DELTA = (Sensing.Timer() * 30);
        FPS = Operator.Round((((Av.FPS[1] + (Av.FPS[2] + Av.FPS[3])) + (Av.FPS[4] + (Av.FPS[6] + Av.FPS[5]))) / 6));
        Sensing.ResetTimer();
    }
}

WhenGreenFlagClicked()
{
    RES = 6;
    GHOST = 2;
}

WhenGreenFlagClicked()
{
    Forever
    {
        Sound.PlayUntilDone(POL-the-foyer-short);
    }
}

WhenGreenFlagClicked()
{
    Forever
    {
        If Sensing.KeyPressed(p)
        {
            Variable.Show(FOV);
            Variable.Show(FPS);
            Variable.Show(RES);
            Wait Until (Not (Sensing.KeyPressed(p)));
            Wait Until Sensing.KeyPressed(p);
            Variable.Hide(FPS);
            Variable.Hide(FOV);
            Variable.Hide(RES);
            Wait Until (Not (Sensing.KeyPressed(p)));
        }
        Else
        {
        }
    }
}


//----- Costumes ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

backdrop1.svg
backdrop2.svg


//----- Sounds --------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

POL-the-foyer-short.wav
